subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of hearts! Cherish Thou the steadfast friends and make the mirror of hearts distinguished from all else besides Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محبوب دلها ياران ثابت را بنواز و آئينهء قلوب را از ما سوی ممتاز فرما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
